disclosureBoundary.rehearsalRule: Local and staging-testnet rehearsal evidence may expose source-safe ids, proof roots, docs links, runbook links, dashboard ids, incident classes, redaction posture, and summary counts only; it must not expose secrets, protected source, raw protected prompts, buyer repository private data, wallet private material, or unpaid AssetPack source.

rows.title: Local telemetry documentation rehearsal
rows.purpose: Follow the local operator path from documentation discovery through source-safe telemetry proof-root review before any staging work.
rows.sourceSafetyRule: Rehearsal evidence may expose lane ids, event ids, proof roots, docs links, runbook ids, dashboard ids, incident classes, redaction posture, and summary counts only.
rows.failClosedResult: local_telemetry_documentation_rehearsal blocks when documentation discovery, telemetry event emission, dashboard/runbook lookup, docs QA, incident drill, proof-root review, or source-safety evidence is incomplete

rows.title: Staging-testnet telemetry documentation rehearsal
rows.purpose: Follow the staging-testnet path across Terminal, API, MCP API, ChatGPT App, docs, telemetry, dashboards, runbooks, and proof roots without value-bearing mainnet admission.
rows.sourceSafetyRule: Rehearsal evidence may expose lane ids, event ids, proof roots, docs links, runbook ids, dashboard ids, incident classes, redaction posture, and summary counts only.
rows.failClosedResult: staging_testnet_telemetry_documentation_rehearsal blocks when documentation discovery, telemetry event emission, dashboard/runbook lookup, docs QA, incident drill, proof-root review, or source-safety evidence is incomplete

rows.title: Dashboard and runbook lookup rehearsal
rows.purpose: Start from emitted event families and prove operators can resolve dashboard panels, alert thresholds, runbook ids, and source-safe repair commands.
rows.sourceSafetyRule: Rehearsal evidence may expose lane ids, event ids, proof roots, docs links, runbook ids, dashboard ids, incident classes, redaction posture, and summary counts only.
rows.failClosedResult: dashboard_runbook_lookup_rehearsal blocks when documentation discovery, telemetry event emission, dashboard/runbook lookup, docs QA, incident drill, proof-root review, or source-safety evidence is incomplete

rows.title: Docs QA incident drill
rows.purpose: Rehearse stale docs, missing generated artifacts, unsupported disclosure, and source-unsafe payload blockers from the docs QA report.
rows.sourceSafetyRule: Rehearsal evidence may expose lane ids, event ids, proof roots, docs links, runbook ids, dashboard ids, incident classes, redaction posture, and summary counts only.
rows.failClosedResult: docs_qa_incident_drill blocks when documentation discovery, telemetry event emission, dashboard/runbook lookup, docs QA, incident drill, proof-root review, or source-safety evidence is incomplete

rows.title: Source-safe proof-root review
rows.purpose: Review proof roots, artifact roots, row roots, and source-safety verdicts without exposing protected source, secrets, wallet private material, or unpaid AssetPack source.
rows.sourceSafetyRule: Rehearsal evidence may expose lane ids, event ids, proof roots, docs links, runbook ids, dashboard ids, incident classes, redaction posture, and summary counts only.
rows.failClosedResult: source_safe_proof_root_review blocks when documentation discovery, telemetry event emission, dashboard/runbook lookup, docs QA, incident drill, proof-root review, or source-safety evidence is incomplete

rows.title: Value-bearing mainnet blocked rehearsal
rows.purpose: Make the value-bearing mainnet non-admission visible while preserving local, staging-testnet, public-testnet, and mainnet-ready dry-run rehearsal paths.
rows.sourceSafetyRule: Rehearsal evidence may expose lane ids, event ids, proof roots, docs links, runbook ids, dashboard ids, incident classes, redaction posture, and summary counts only.
rows.failClosedResult: value_bearing_mainnet_blocked_rehearsal remains blocked until future canon explicitly admits value-bearing mainnet
